_meta.name: okta-list-groups
_meta.description: List all groups in the Okta admin console. Uses perceive (not read) because Okta is a React SPA — read returns null after client-side navigation.
anomalies: perceive required instead of read — SPA navigation does not reinitialize content script
Table has 2 rows (Everyone + Okta Administrators) in fresh trial org

chain.note: Hard-coded admin subdomain. DO NOT use relative URLs — extension resolves them against chrome-extension:// origin.
Wait for React render. MUI tables need ~2-3s after navigate.
perceive returns: headings, buttons, fields, mainActions, tables. Table schema: ['Group name', 'People', 'Applications']. mainActions include group hrefs like /admin/group/{id}.

groups-table.description: MUI data table listing all groups
groups-table.note: Groups are also visible as hrefs in mainActions with path /admin/group/{groupId}

add-group-action.description: Link to create a new group
